# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  release-and-publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Create GitHub release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          RELEASE_NAME: 'Release v${GITHUB_REF}'
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          release_name: 'Release v${GITHUB_REF}'

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          npm publish --access public

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi@v1.0.2
        env:
          PYPI_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
          PYPI_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: release-${GITHUB_REF}
          path: dist

      - name: Delete release
        uses: actions/delete-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          release_id: ${{ steps.create-release.outputs.release_id }}

  publish-npm-pypi:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          npm publish --access public

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi@v1.0.2
        env:
          PYPI_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
          PYPI_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}

  publish-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: release-${GITHUB_REF}
          path: dist
